data.ocrPrompt: Extract ALL readable text from this image. Return ONLY the raw text content, exactly as it appears. Do not add commentary, analysis, or formatting. If there is no text in the image, return "NO_TEXT_FOUND". Preserve the original language (Filipino, English, Taglish, etc.)
data.rawExtractedText:
Bongbong Marcos
19h
Sa oras ng panganib, hindi dapat madagdagan ang hirap ng ating mga kababayan.
Kaya ipinag-utos ko ang agarang pagkilos ng mga ahensya ng pamahalaan upang tumugon sa
ashfall mula sa Mayon Volcano eruption.
Nililinis ang mga kalsada, namamahagi ng N95 masks, at naglalagay ng water stations, mobile
clinics, at tulong para sa mga lumikas upang maprotektahan ang ating mga komunidad.
Patuloy nating binabantayan ang sitwasyon, kabilang ang panganib ng lahar.
...
Alam nating may epekto ito sa kalusugan at kabuhayan ng ating mga kababayan, kaya't tuloy-
tuloy ang tulong ng pamahalaan hanggang makabalik sa normal ang pang-araw-araw na buhay ng
bawat pamilyang apektado.
COURTESY DOST-PHIVOLCS
May 2, 2026
DOST-PHIV RTVM
PHILIPPINE INSTITUTE OF
VOLCANOLOGY AND SEISMOLOGY
OneDOST4U: Solutions and Opportunities for All
PRESIDENTIAL BROADCAST
Mayo:02 Valcano 2026-05-02 05:41 PM

```json
{
  "label": "True",
  "confidence": 95,
  "marites_explanation": "Ayy girl, totoo yan! Mayon Volcano erupted nga nung May 2026 and nag-cause ng ashfall. Si BBM mismo nag-utos na tumulong ang government agencies para sa mga apektado. Mabuti naman!",
  "claims": [
    "Government agencies are responding to Mayon Volcano ashfall.",
    "Roads are being cleaned, N95 masks distributed, and water stations/mobile clinics are being set up.",
    "The government is providing assistance to evacuees.",
    "The situation is being monitored, including the risk of lahar."
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "Multiple trusted sources confirm Mayon Volcano eruption and subsequent government response (Rappler, PNA, Manila Bulletin, pco.gov.ph).",
    "Sources mention ashfall affecting thousands in Albay (Rappler).",
    "Government response operations are underway (pco.gov.ph, PNA)."
  ],
  "linguistic_flags": [],
  "fact_correction": null
}
```

data.label: True
data.explanation: Ayy girl, totoo yan! Mayon Volcano erupted nga nung May 2026 and nag-cause ng ashfall. Si BBM mismo nag-utos na tumulong ang government agencies para sa mga apektado. Mabuti naman!
claims: Government agencies are responding to Mayon Volcano ashfall.
Roads are being cleaned, N95 masks distributed, and water stations/mobile clinics are being set up.
The government is providing assistance to evacuees.
The situation is being monitored, including the risk of lahar.
evidence: Multiple trusted sources confirm Mayon Volcano eruption and subsequent government response (Rappler, PNA, Manila Bulletin, pco.gov.ph).
Sources mention ashfall affecting thousands in Albay (Rappler).
Government response operations are underway (pco.gov.ph, PNA).

data.summary: Verifying factual claims involves checking if government actions match reports from trusted news sources.
data.tip: Always look for multiple sources to back up claims, especially from government officials.

literacyLesson.summary: Verifying factual claims involves checking if government actions match reports from trusted news sources.

points.issue: BBM's post says government agencies are responding to the Mayon ashfall.
points.correction: News from Rappler and PNA confirm the same thing, making the claim credible.

points.issue: The post mentions specific actions like cleaning roads and distributing masks.
points.correction: PCO.gov.ph (official government website) also reports these actions, backing up the claim.

points.issue: Marcos mentioned that they're watching out for lahar.
points.correction: Media outlets are also reporting about the lahar, which shows the claim is consistent with other information.

literacyLesson.tip: Always look for multiple sources to back up claims, especially from government officials.
